{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":349729,"duration_api_ms":348454,"ttft_ms":4909,"num_turns":45,"result":"Review complete. **Verdict: PASS** — no findings, nothing blocks pack or goal closeout, no unresolved P0/P1.

CP00-700 is a clean descriptor-only increment. I verified through read-only inspection that:
- Product source emits only frozen descriptor objects with no network/filesystem/credential I/O; validators actively reject any runtime opening, payload/credential exposure, or real-data loading.
- All boundary attestations (writes_product_state, runtime dispatch, persistence, audit, real-data) are `false`, and tests assert the CP700 descriptor stays runtime-closed with the authority boundary intact (Claude non-final, human approval required for runtime opening at CP00-701).
- The regenerated contract validates `valid:true` with the CP700 distribution matching the baseline exactly.
- Pack evidence makes no inflated claim — `production_ready:false`, pending this review — and plan/queue/manifest agree CP00-700 is the live pack.
- The review harness enforces read-only tools and CP178+ hardening; Hermes is descriptor-only control-plane, not product runtime.","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"d303b8f1-e511-4ffa-914a-899bfd3be6b7","total_cost_usd":2.6880464999999996,"usage":{"input_tokens":58,"cache_creation_input_tokens":139700,"cache_read_input_tokens":2461455,"output_tokens":23307,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":139700,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[{"input_tokens":2,"output_tokens":375,"cache_read_input_tokens":134094,"cache_creation_input_tokens":6030,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":6030},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001":{"inputTokens":1129,"outputTokens":20,"cacheReadInputTokens":0,"cacheCreationInputTokens":0,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":0.001229,"contextWindow":200000,"maxOutputTokens":32000},"claude-opus-4-8":{"inputTokens":58,"outputTokens":23307,"cacheReadInputTokens":2461455,"cacheCreationInputTokens":139700,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":2.6868175,"contextWindow":200000,"maxOutputTokens":32000}},"permission_denials":[],"structured_output":{"overall_verdict":"PASS","blocks_pack_closeout":false,"blocks_goal_closeout":false,"no_unresolved_p0":true,"no_unresolved_p1":true,"summary":"CP00-700 (RP23 External Integrations II finance-integrations P02 fixture/test bridge, risk class A, 10 units RP23.P02.M06.S15-RP23.P02.M07.S02) passes independent read-only review with no findings. Implementation in packages/finance-integrations/src/{registry,service,validators,index}.js is purely descriptor-only: it emits frozen objects, and a targeted grep for network/filesystem/credential/SQL operations surfaced only no-write attestation flags (all false) and no-leak guard string literals — no product runtime, writes, or real-data access. The NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION (registry.js:120) zeroes every write/dispatch/persist/expose flag, and validateDescriptor (validators.js:8) actively rejects rows that would open bank/card/WEHAGO/Douzone/tax/DART runtime, expose financial payloads, credentials, permission-decision detail, or audit bodies, or load real fixture data. test/model.test.js:28-30 asserts the CP700 descriptor stays runtime-closed with claude_is_final_approval=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true, runtime_opening_pack_id=CP00-701, and contract.validation.valid=true. The deterministically regenerated contract reports validation.valid=true with the CP700 coverage distribution {ui:1,implementation:2,failure_recovery:2,test:4,contract:1} and micro-title split {Synthetic Fixture Set:8,Test And Golden Case Set:2} matching the pack baseline exactly, and the CP700 descriptor sub-validation valid:true/errors:[]. Pack evidence is internally consistent and makes no inflated claim: manifest, command-evidence, construction-inspection, and adjudication all report production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, writes_product_state=false, no_real_data=true, status in_progress/pending_review — the pack is pending exactly this hardened review. The live plan (live_state.pack_id=CP00-700) and next-pack-queue (live_latest_pack_id=CP00-700) agree with the manifest. Claude remains a read-only, non-final reviewer: the runner (run-closeout-pack-claude-review.mjs) and hardening lib enforce Read,Grep,Glob only, forbid Bash/Edit/Write/WebFetch/mcp__, and reject auth failures, 0-byte stdout, malformed/fenced JSON, tool-call-shaped output, and missing required fields; Hermes patterns appear only as descriptor-only control-plane evidence packets (emits_runtime_receipt=false), not product runtime. Readiness and auth preflight passed cleanly (prompt 2443B under the 25600B cap, no embedded full diff/source, forbidden_tools_present=false). The human/enterprise-trust final-approval boundary is closed outside this receipt and the pack does not claim runtime or enterprise trust, so per instruction blocks_goal_closeout is not set on that basis. No P0/P1/P2/P3 issues; pack is closeout-eligible.","findings":[],"finding_counts":{"p0":0,"p1":0,"p2":0,"p3":0,"reported_p0":0,"reported_p1":0,"reported_p2":0,"reported_p3":0}},"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"3273fc75-6987-42c9-acbf-92bfa1741954"}
